title: T-069 — nutrition_profiles + nutrition_allergens + nutri_score_results tables (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-069 — Nutrition schema

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create nutrition tables backing the Nutrition stage screen: nutrition_profiles (per-FA per-100g + per-portion values for 7 nutrients), nutrition_allergens (audited allergen set per FA), nutri_score_results (computed grade A-E + score history) + Reference.Nutrients seed (7 nutrient codes).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0069_nutrition.sql creates 3 tables + Reference.Nutrients seed (energy_kj, fat_g, saturates_g, carbs_g, sugars_g, protein_g, salt_g) per EU FIC 1169/2011.
2. nutrition_profiles (id PK, tenant_id, product_code FK fa, nutrient_code FK Reference.Nutrients, per_100g_value, per_portion_value, computed_at).
3. nutri_score_results (id PK, product_code, formulation_version_id, grade CHECK in A/B/C/D/E, computed_score, computed_at).
4. RLS + indexes (tenant_id, product_code) on each table; Drizzle schemas + barrel.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0069_nutrition.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/nutrition.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/nutrition.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0069 runs, when SELECT nutrient_code FROM "Reference.Nutrients" runs, then it returns exactly 7 codes (energy_kj, fat_g, saturates_g, carbs_g, sugars_g, protein_g, salt_g) per §17.11.2 + EU FIC 1169/2011
2. Given an INSERT into nutri_score_results with grade='F' is attempted, when it runs, then it fails CHECK constraint per §17.11.2 grade enum (A-E only)
3. Given two tenants seeded, when tenant A SELECT * FROM nutrition_profiles runs, then it returns only tenant A rows (RLS verified)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/nutrition.test.ts asserting Reference.Nutrients seed count + grade CHECK + RLS before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test nutrition'

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit any of the 7 EU FIC nutrients in seed
- Do not allow grade values outside A-E
- Do not skip RLS on any table
